description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 4, 2024 at 6:28 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Culver City, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on Culver Boulevard near Sepulveda Boulevard. 
 
The Waymo AV was stopped in traffic for a red light on southwestbound Culver Boulevard with an SUV stopped directly behind the 
Waymo AV. Moments later, a passenger car traveling at a high rate of speed approached the stopped SUV from behind and made contact 
with the rear of the SUV. The front of the SUV then made contact with the rear of the stopped Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the 
Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. All three vehicles sustained damage.  
Print
Clear Form
